title: Junior Instructional Designer at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies:
EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
